2604.26501.title: Tree-of-Text: A Tree-based Prompting Framework for Table-to-Text Generation in the Sports Domain
2604.26501.paper_summary: Generating sports game reports from structured tables is a complex table-to-text task that demands both precise data interpretation and fluent narrative generation. Traditional model-based approaches require large, annotated datasets, while prompt-based methods using large language models (LLMs) often struggle with hallucination due to weak table comprehension. To overcome these challenges, we propose Tree-of-Text, a tree-structured prompting framework that guides LLMs through a three-stage generation process: (1) Content Planning, where relevant operations and arguments are selected from the input tables; (2) Operation Execution, which breaks down large tables into manageable sub-tables; and (3) Content Generation, where short textual outputs are merged and rewritten into a cohesive report. Experiments show that our method outperforms existing methods on ShuttleSet+, leads in RG and CO metrics on RotoWire-FG, and excels in CS and CO on MLB with roughly 40% of the time and cost of Chain-of-Table. These results demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of Tree-of-Text and suggest a promising direction for prompt-based table-to-text generation in the sports domain.
2604.26501.paper_summary_zh: 從結構化表格生成體育賽事報告是一項複雜的表格到文本任務，要求精確的數據解釋和流暢的敘述生成。傳統的基於模型的方法需要大量的標註數據集，而基於提示的方法使用大型語言模型（LLMs）時，常常因為表格理解能力不足而出現幻覺。為了克服這些挑戰，我們提出了Tree-of-Text，一種樹狀結構的提示框架，指導LLMs通過三個階段的生成過程：（1）內容規劃，在此階段從輸入表格中選擇相關的操作和參數；（2）操作執行，將大型表格拆分為可管理的子表格；以及（3）內容生成，將短文本輸出合併並重寫成一份連貫的報告。實驗顯示，我們的方法在ShuttleSet+上超越了現有的方法，在RotoWire-FG的RG和CO指標上領先，並在MLB的CS和CO上表現優異，所需時間和成本約為Chain-of-Table的40%。這些結果展示了Tree-of-Text的有效性和效率，並為體育領域的基於提示的表格到文本生成提供了一個有前景的方向。
2604.26501.author: Shang-Hsuan Chiang et.al.
2604.26501.authors: Shang-Hsuan Chiang, Tsan-Tsung Yang, An-Zi Yen, Wen-Chih Peng
